question: How many days passed between the day I repotted the previous spider plant and the day I gave my neighbor, Mrs. Johnson, a few cuttings from my spider plant?
gold_answer: 14 days. 15 days (including the last day) is also acceptable.
reasoning_summary: From memory m_cc12acaa84b303407978 (source 19), user repotted the previous spider plant on 2023-03-04. From memory m_b12667337e8c4247cf22 (source 154), user gave Mrs. Johnson cuttings from the spider plant on 2023-03-18. The number of days between these two dates is 14 days.
adaptive_choice_reason: same answer with stronger specialist support
